message:
fix(web): case-insensitive header lookups in multipart, session, negotiate

multipart.rs used HashMap::get("content-type") which misses headers
stored as "Content-Type". session.rs had the same issue for "cookie",
and negotiate.rs for "accept". All now use case-insensitive iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
